loop_steps.name: REHYDRATE
loop_steps.description: Load origin manifest, route map, context indexes, and claim locks.

loop_steps.name: ORIENT
loop_steps.description: Resolve RCC Nexus route, local surface, claim ceiling, and validation path.

loop_steps.name: COMPILE
loop_steps.description: Compress the runtime loop into ASCII, Bash, PowerShell, and evidence runbooks.

loop_steps.name: RUN
loop_steps.description: Execute the Tessera smoke/runtime cycle under declared graph and thresholds.

loop_steps.name: MEASURE
loop_steps.description: Emit rate-distortion, gates, wounds, baseline summary, and certificate artifacts.

loop_steps.name: VALIDATE
loop_steps.description: Run RCC, README, architecture, unit, and latest-run evidence checks.

loop_steps.name: LEDGER
loop_steps.description: Record run identity, Git state, lessons, and non-claim boundaries.

loop_steps.name: DISCONNECT
loop_steps.description: Extract lessons learned without importing Hermes runtime authority.

claim_boundary: Loop compilation improves operator visibility and repeatability; it does not prove code correctness, safety, production readiness, or real telemetry transfer.
